## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/run_all_tests.py` passes locally
- [ ] If backend-only: `pytest` for the touched module passes
- [ ] If frontend-only: `cd static/js && npm test` passes
- [ ] If user-facing: tested on a Raspberry Pi 4 (or stated otherwise below)

## Pi hardware notes

If this PR touches request paths, socket handlers, indexing, uploads/downloads, or background jobs, briefly note any impact on memory or CPU on Pi-class hardware.
